suggestions.vacant-seat: Drop placeholder rows at scrape time (filter name == "Vacant" in scrape-contacts.ts).
suggestions.duplicate-roster-row: Dedupe the roster scraper on the member-page URL; the duplicate carried a spelling variant of the same name.
suggestions.seat-conflict: Manual review: the existing DB holder (from leaders.json) shares zero name tokens with the authoritative roster — likely stale seed data to retire by hand.
suggestions.source-name-conflict: Manual review: at least one of parliament/wikipedia/mzalendo is stale for this seat (by-elections, court rulings).
suggestions.name-collision: Manual review: a different person with the same name slug already has an account, and seedPeople keys idempotency on slugify(name)@seed.leaders.ke — seed these by hand with a disambiguated name (e.g. include the middle name).
suggestions.party-mismatch: Informational — parliament.go.ke party was seeded; review for post-election defections if party accuracy matters.
suggestions.name-order-unverified: Seeded from parliament's SURNAME-first form; fix firstName/otherNames by hand or extend the scraper to read the member's own page.

creates.name: Patrick Makau King'ola
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Patrick Makau King'ola is a Kenyan politician who serves as Wiper Democratic Movement – Kenya Member of the National Assembly representing Mavoko Constituency.

creates.name: Benjamin Mwangi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Benjamin Mwangi is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance and MP for Embakasi Central. First elected as a member of parliament in 2017 under the jubilee party as member of parliament Embakasi Central constituency, he is now serving his second term in office.

creates.name: Benjamin Kipkirui Langat
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Amb. CPA Benjamin Kipkirui Langat, CBS is the current Member of Parliament for Ainamoi Constituency and immediate former Kenya High Commissioner to Namibia. He also served as the Member of Parliament for Ainamoi Constituency in Kericho from 2008 to 2017. He holds a Master of Business Administration Degree in Accounting and Bachelor of Commerce Degree both from the University of Nairobi. He is also a fully qualified Certified Public Accountant and member of the Institute of Certified Public Accountants of Kenya in good standing.

creates.name: Robert Pukose
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Dr. Robert Pukose is a Kenyan politician. He was elected a member of Parliament Endebess in the Trans Nzoia county in the year 2013 to date. He was the First MP after 2010 Constitution and formation of Endebess constituency. The Watlrd is made up of Sabaot, Nandi, Bukusu, Turkana, and Pokot ethnic groups. He vied on a URP (URP) ticket and emerged victorious after beating his closest rival. He is a trained Medical Doctor by Profession.

creates.name: Phylis Jepkemoi Bartoo
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Phylis Jepkemoi Bartoo is a Kenyan politician. She is a member of the United Democratic Alliance party (UDA) and the member of parliament for the Moiben Constituency from 2022.

creates.name: Yusuf Hassan Abdi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Yusuf Hassan Abdi is a Kenyan politician, diplomat, social activist and former journalist. After working many years with the United Nations, he joined the Kenya parliament as a legislator in 2011.

creates.name: Donya Dorice Aburi
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Dorice Donya Aburi is a Kenyan politician. She is a member of the Wiper Democratic Movement – Kenya party.

creates.name: Lawrence Mpuru Aburi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Lawrence Mpuru Aburi is a Kenyan politician from the National Ordinary People Empowerment Union (NOPEU). In the 2022 Kenyan general election, he was the only candidate from his party who was elected to the National Assembly, representing the Tigania East constituency in Meru County.

creates.name: Beatrice Adagala
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Beatrice Kahai Adagala is a Kenyan politician who currently serves in the Kenya National Assembly as a county woman representative for Vihiga.

creates.name: Hon Kulow Maalim Hassan
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Kulow Maalim Hassan was a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Movement (UDM). In 2017 and 2022 he was elected Member of Parliament for Banissa Constituency.

creates.name: Samuel Arama
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Samuel Arama is a Kenyan politician who has served as a member of the National Assembly for the Nakuru Town West constituency since 2013. He is a member of the Jubilee Party, having previously represented the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Samuel Atandi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Samuel Atandi is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement who has been Member of the National Assembly for Alego Usonga since 2017. He was re-elected at the 2022 general election.

creates.name: Owino Paul Ongili Babu
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Babu Owino Paul Ongili is the current sitting Member of the National Assembly for Embakasi East Constituency in Kenya's 13th Parliament, elected on the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) ticket. He won the seat in August 2022 with 57,410 votes, defeating Francis Mureithi. He previously served as chairperson of the Students Organisation of Nairobi University (SONU).

creates.name: Bady Twalib Bady
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Bady Bady Twalib is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Jomvu constituency, Mombasa County, elected on the ODM ticket in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027). He won the 2022 general election with 13,850 votes, defeating Renson Thoya of Jubilee. First elected in 2013, he is now serving his third consecutive term.

creates.name: Gladys Boss Shollei
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Gladys Jepkosgei Boss is a Kenyan politician who is currently the Deputy Speaker of the Kenya National Assembly and woman representative for Uasin Gishu County She is a member of the United Democratic Alliance.

creates.name: Ruth Odinga
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Ruth Busia Adhiambo Odinga is a Kenyan politician and current County Woman Representative for Kisumu County in the National Assembly. She was the first Deputy Governor for Kisumu County from 2013 to 2017. Odinga is a member of the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). She is the daughter to Jaramogi Odinga, the first vice president of Kenya, and the sister of both former Prime Minister the late Raila Odinga and Oburu Odinga, the serving Senator for Siaya County.

creates.name: Rozaah Akinyi Buyu
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Rozaah Akinyi Buyu is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). She represents the Kisumu West Constituency in the National Assembly.

creates.name: Liza Chelule
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Chelule Chepkorir Liza is a Kenyan politician who currently sits in the National Assembly as the county woman representative for Nakuru County.

creates.name: Samuel Kiprono Chepkonga
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Samuel Chepkonga is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance who has been member of the National Assembly for the Ainabkoi constituency since 2022.

creates.name: Linet Chepkorir
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Linet Chepkorir Toto is a Kenyan politician and member of the UDA party. Following the general election on 9 August 2022, Toto is presumed to be the youngest woman to be elected to the National Assembly as the Woman County Representative for Bomet County.

creates.name: Hon Charity Kathambi Chepkwony
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Charity Kathambi Chepkwony is a Kenyan politician. She is the member of parliament for Njoro Constituency.

creates.name: Joseph Kimutai Cherorot
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Joseph Kimutai Cherorot is a Kenyan politician who is currently a member of the National Assembly for the Kipkelion East constituency, representing the Peoples Democratic Party.

creates.name: John Chikati Murumba
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: John Murumba Chikati is a Kenyan politician and the current Secretary General for the Forum for the Restoration of Democracy – Kenya (FORD-Kenya). Chikati is also the current Member of National Assembly for Tongaren Constituency, and the current Secretary General for Catholic MPs Spiritual Support Initiative (CAMPSSI). He is the immediate former Special Secretary for Strategy and Delivery in the Office of the Deputy President.

creates.name: Samwel Moroto Chumel
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Samuel Chumel Moroto is a Kenyan politician. He represents Kapenguria Constituency in the Kenyan National Assembly of the Kenyan parliament. He belongs to the Kenya African National Union (KANU) party. He is a career teacher and trade unionist. He was first elected to parliament in 2002. He hails from the Pokot community which mainly inhabits West Pokot County.

creates.name: Abdul Rahim Dawood
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Abdul Rahim Dawood is a member of the National Assembly of Kenya representing North Imenti Constituency, Meru County, serving as an Independent in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027). He is a Kenyan businessman.

creates.name: Beatrice Elachi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Beatrice Kadeveresia Elachi is a Kenyan politician who currently serves as the member of parliament for Dagoretti North constituency. Prior, she served as Speaker of the Nairobi County Assembly from 6 September 2017 until her resignation on 11 August 2020. As Speaker of the Nairobi County Assembly, she replaced Alex Ole Magelo, who did not contest his seat. Immediately prior to her election, she was the Majority Whip in the Kenya Senate.

creates.name: James Mwangi Gakuya
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. James Mwangi Gakuya is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Embakasi North Constituency, Nairobi County, serving in the 13th Parliament after being elected on a UDA ticket in the 2022 general election. He first won the seat in the 2013 general election on a TNA (Jubilee coalition) ticket.

creates.name: David Gikaria
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: David Gikaria is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. In the 2022 Kenyan general election, he was elected to a third term as Member of Parliament for Nakuru Town East.

creates.name: Faith Wairimu Gitau
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Faith Wairimū Gitaū is a Kenyan politician. She is a member of the United Democratic Alliance (UDA).

creates.name: Robert Gichimu Githinji
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Robert Gìchimū Gìthìnji is a Kenyan lawyer and politician who has served in the National Assembly of Kenya since 2017, representing the Gichugu Constituency.

creates.name: Lillian Gogo
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Lilian Achieng Gogo is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). She represents the Rangwe Constituency in the National Assembly.

creates.name: Ali Wario Guyo
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Ali Wario is a Kenyan politician and a member of the 9th and 11th Parliament of Kenya. He was an assistant minister for Home Affairs from 2003 to 2006. Wario joined politics in 2002 and won Bura Constituency seat to the 9th Kenyan national assembly on the ticket of Kenya African National Union (KANU) party ticket in 2002. He lost his reelection to Nassir Nuh Abdi in 2007 but reclaimed the seat in the 2013 election to the 11th parliament on the ticket of The National Alliance (TNA) in the Jubilee Coalition. He was appointed Assistant Minister of Home Affairs in 2003 and served until 2006 when he was redeployed as an Assistant Minister for Special Programmes. He was a member of Departmental Committee on Public Works, Roads & Transport in the 11th parliament.

creates.name: Kimani Ichung'wah
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Anthony Kĩmani Ichũng'wah is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. He is the majority leader in the National Assembly of the 13th Parliament of Kenya.

creates.name: Fatuma Abdi Jehow
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Fatuma Abdi Jehow is a Kenyan politician from Wajir county. A member of the National Assembly of Kenya, she is the current women representative for Wajir county. She won the seat through the Orange Democratic Movement in the 2022 Kenya General Elections. It has been six months since Jehow gained the Women representative seat.

creates.name: Junet Mohamed
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Junet Mohamed is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). He is the minority leader in the National Assembly of the 13th Parliament of Kenya.

creates.name: Kagiri Jane Wangechi
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Jane Wangechi Kagiri is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. In the 2022 Kenyan general election she was elected women's representative from Laikipia County.

creates.name: Gabriel Kagombe
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Gabriel Gathuka Kagombe is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. In the 2022 Kenyan general election, he was elected to succeed Moses Kuria as MP for the Gatundu South Constituency. Kagombe is a political science alumni from uon.

creates.name: Joyce Kamene
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Joyce Kamene Kasimbi is a Kenyan politician serving as the Woman Representative for Machakos County, having been elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022 under the Wiper Democratic Movement. She is a member of the National Assembly.

creates.name: Joshua Chepyegon Kandie
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Joshua Chepyegon Kandie is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance (UDA), formerly from the Maendeleo Chap Chap Party. In the elections of 2017 and 2022, he was elected to the National Assembly in Baringo Central Constituency.

creates.name: Irene Kasalu
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Irene Muthoni Kasalu is the sitting Woman Representative for Kitui County in Kenya's National Assembly, serving in the 13th Parliament on a Wiper Democratic Movement – Kenya (WDM-K) ticket. First elected in 2017, she was re-elected in 2022 with 201,899 votes, defeating Peninah Malonza of UDA.

creates.name: Adan Keynan Wehliye
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Aden Keynan Wehliye is a Member of the National Assembly of Kenya. He served Wajir West constituency from 1997 to 2002 and 2007 to 2013. He then moved to Eldas constituency which was carved from Wajir West. Keynan served as the MP of Eldas in the 11th and 12th parliaments. He represented the Orange Democratic Movement until 2017 when he switched to the Jubilee Party. Keynan was re-elected on the Jubilee ticket in the 2022 elections. He is the longest-serving MP of the 13th Parliament of Kenya.

creates.name: Mishi Juma Khamisi Mboko
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Mishi Juma Khamisi Mboko is a Kenyan politician and a Member of Parliament for Likoni Constituency in Mombasa County. Mishi Mboko has been a member of the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM), since 2017

creates.name: Suzanne Kiamba
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Suzanne Ndunge Kiamba is a Kenyan politician from the WDM-K. She represents the Makueni Constituency in the National Assembly.

creates.name: Antoney Kibagendi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Antoney Kibagendi is a Kenyan politician. He is a member of the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Jayne Wanjiru Njeri Kihara
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Jayne Njeri Wanjirū Kìhara is a Kenyan politician. She is currently the only member of parliament for Naivasha Constituency.

creates.name: Joseph Kipkoross Makilap
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Joseph Kipkoross Makilap is a Kenyan politician who is currently a member of the National Assembly for the Baringo North constituency, representing the Peoples Democratic Party.

creates.name: Marianne Kitany
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Marianne Jebet Kitany is a Kenyan politician who is member of parliament for Aldai Constituency in Nandi County. She is the former chief of staff to the 11th deputy president of Kenya, William Ruto.

creates.name: Mwangi Kiunjuri
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Kìūnjūri Festus Mwangi is a politician born in Kieni, Nyeri County. He has held various political and government positions.

creates.name: Harrison Garama Kombe
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Harrison Mwalimu Garama Kombe is a Kenyan teacher and politician. He was first elected to the Kenya National Assembly from Magarini Constituency on the ticket of Shirikisho Party in 2002. He suffered a defeat in 2007 and returned to the parliament in 2013 and was reelected in 2017 before being defeated again in the 2022 parliamentary election.

creates.name: Hon Sara Paulata Korere
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Sara Paulata Korere is a Kenyan politician. She is the member of parliament for Laikipia North constituency.

creates.name: Elijah Njoroge Kururia
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Elijah Njoroge Kururia is a Kenyan politician who is currently a member of the National Assembly for the Gatundu North constituency as an Independent politician.

creates.name: Lekuton Joseph
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Joseph Lemasolai Lekuton is a Kenyan politician. He belongs to the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) and was elected to represent the Laisamis Constituency in the National Assembly of Kenya since the 2007 Kenyan parliamentary election and reelected in 2013. He was not elected in 2017, but returned in 2022. He joined Kenya Kwanza after being elected in the 2022 general election.

creates.name: Hon Naisula Lesuuda
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Naisula Josephine Lesuuda is a Kenyan politician and women's rights activist. She is a Member of the Parliament of Kenya.

creates.name: Joseph Samal Lomwa
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Joseph Samal Lomwa is a Kenyan politician and a member of the 11th Kenyan parliament elected from Isiolo North Constituency on the ticket of United Republican Party (URP) in 2013. He succeeded Mohammed Kuti of the Kenya African National Union (KANU) and Narc-K party. In the parliament, Lomwa served on Public Works, Roads & Transport committee. He did not run for reelection in 2017 as he failed to secure the endorsement of his clan's council of elders.

creates.name: Farah Maalim
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Farah Maalim Mohamed is a Kenyan veteran politician who served as the Member of Parliament for Lagdera Constituency from 29 December 1992 to 29 December 1997 and then from 27 December 2007 to 4 March 2013. He's currently serving as the Member of Parliament for Dadaab Constituency since 9 August 2022 and a Member of the Speaker's Panel. He also served as the Deputy Speaker of the National Assembly of Kenya from 15 January 2008 to 14 January 2013. He is an Advocate of the High Court of Kenya.

creates.name: Jane Njeri Maina
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Jane Njeri Maina is a Kenyan politician who is currently a member of the Kenya National Assembly as Woman Representative for Kirinyaga County. She is a member of the United Democratic Alliance a Kenya Kwanza affiliate party.

creates.name: Maina Betty Njeri
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Betty Maina is a Kenyan politician who is currently Cabinet Secretary for Industrialization, Trade and Enterprise Development in the cabinet of Kenya.

creates.name: Mary Maingi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Mary Maingi is a Kenyan politician who has been a member of parliament for the Mwea constituency. She was the only woman elected in Kirinyaga County in 2022.

creates.name: John Makali
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: John Makali is a Kenyan politician from Ford-K who has been MP for Kanduyi Constituency since the 2022 Kenyan general election.

creates.name: Marubu Muthoni Monicah
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Marubu Muthoni Monicah is the County Woman Representative for Lamu County and a sitting Member of the National Assembly in Kenya's 13th Parliament (2022–2027). She was elected on 9 August 2022.

creates.name: Masito Fatuma Hamisi
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Fatuma Hamisi Masito is a Kenyan politician. She is a member of the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Nimrod Mbithuka Mbai
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Nimrod Mbithuka Mbai is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Kitui East Constituency, Kitui County, elected on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027). A Kenyan politician, he remains an incumbent expected to defend the seat in 2027.

creates.name: Jessica N. Mbalu
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Jessica Nduku Kiko Mbalu is a Kenyan politician from the WDM-K. She represents the Kibwezi East Constituency in the National Assembly. She is a member of the Kenya Women Parliamentary Association (KEWOPA). The association includes parliamentary women from the National Assembly and the Senate.

creates.name: Robert Mbui
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Robert Mbui, CBS is a Kenyan politician. He is currently a member of the National Assembly representing Kathiani Constituency and Deputy Leader of Minority in the National Assembly. He is the fifth member of parliament to represent the constituency since its inception in 1988. He holds a Master's in Strategic Management from the Kenya Institute of Management.

creates.name: Lydia Haika Mnene Mizighi
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Lydia Haika Mnene Mizighi is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. She is women's representative in the National Assembly from Taita–Taveta County.

creates.name: Amina Mnyazi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Amina Laura Mnyazi is a Kenyan politician who represents the Malindi Constituency in the Kenyan Parliament.

creates.name: Stephen Mogaka
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Stephen K. Mogaka is a Kenyan politician serving as a member of the National Assembly representing West Mugirango.

creates.name: Abdikadir Hussein Mohamed
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Abdikadir Hussein Mohamed is a Kenyan politician. As a member of Safina, Mohamed was elected to represent the Mandera Central Constituency in the National Assembly of Kenya in the 2007 Kenyan parliamentary election, defeating the incumbent Billow Kerrow.

creates.name: Ali Mohamud Mohamed
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Mohamed, Mohamed Ali, popularly known as Moha Jicho Pevu, is a Kenyan politician, media personality and anchor.

creates.name: Fatuma Mohamed
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Fatuma Zainab Mohammed is the Independent County Woman Representative for Migori County in the National Assembly, serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya for a term running from 16 August 2022 to 29 July 2027. Sitting as an Independent, she won the seat in the 2022 general election, defeating Dennitah Ghati. She also chairs the Special Funds Account Committee.

creates.name: Zamzam Mohamed
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Zamzam Mohamed is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Jerusha Momanyi
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Jerusha Mongina Momanyi is the Woman Representative for Nyamira County in the 13th Parliament of Kenya's National Assembly, elected on a Jubilee Party ticket and currently a sitting member. She was re-elected to this seat in 2022 with 84,843 votes, having first been elected Nyamira Woman Representative in 2017 during the 12th Parliament.

creates.name: Irene Mrembo Njoki
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Irene Mrembo Njoki, commonly referred to as Irene Njoki, is a Kenyan politician who was elected member of parliament of Kenya on 9 August 2022, representing Bahati Constituency, Nakuru County, in the 2022–2027 election cycle. She ran as a member of the Jubilee Party. Before joining elective Kenya politics, she was the personal assistant to James Macharia, then cabinet secretary for Transport, Infrastructure, Housing, Urban Development and Public Works, Shipping and Maritime, in the Cabinet of Kenya (2017–2022).

creates.name: Eric Muchangi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Karemba Eric Muchangi Njiru is the current Member of the National Assembly for Runyenjes Constituency, Embu County, elected on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket and serving in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027). Now in his second term, having first been elected in 2017, he chairs the National Assembly's Public Petitions Committee.

creates.name: Innocent Mugabe
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Innocent Mugabe Maino is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement. He represents Likuyani Constituency in the National Assembly of Kenya.

creates.name: Cynthia Muge
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Cynthia Muge nicknamed Cheptikonyol is a Kenyan politician. She served in Kilibwoni and she was elected in a landslide victory in 2022 to the National Assembly to represent Nandi County.

creates.name: Elsie Busihile Muhanda
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Muhanda Elsie Busihile is the Woman Representative for Kakamega County in the National Assembly, serving in the 13th Parliament as a member of ODM. She has held the seat since 2017 and was re-elected in 2022 in a landslide with 300,426 votes.

creates.name: Wanjiku Muhia
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Wanjiku Muhia is the Member of the National Assembly for Kipipiri Constituency, Nyandarua County, in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027), where she serves as a member of the Regional Integration Committee. She won the seat in the 2022 general election on a UDA ticket, defeating incumbent Amos Kimunya. She previously served in the East African Legislative Assembly (4th EALA, 2018-2022).

creates.name: Fabian Kyule Muli
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Fabian Kyule Muli is the Member of the National Assembly for Kangundo Constituency in Machakos County, serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022-2027). He was elected on the Grand Dream Development Party (GDDP) ticket and is the party leader of GDDP, which holds a single seat in the National Assembly.

creates.name: Rose Museo Mumo
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Mumo Rose Museo is the Woman Representative for Makueni County in the National Assembly, serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya as a member of the Wiper Democratic Movement. First elected to the seat in 2013, she won re-election in 2022 with 116,599 votes (49.08%), for a term running from 16 August 2022 to 2027.

creates.name: Hon Danson Mwashako Mwakuwona
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Danson Mwashako Mwakuwona is the current Member of Parliament for Wundanyi Constituency, Taita Taveta County, in the 13th Parliament of Kenya's National Assembly. He holds the seat on a Wiper Democratic Movement-Kenya (WDM-K) ticket, having first been elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022 for a second term.

creates.name: Gertrude Mwanyanje
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Hon. Gertrude Mbeyu Mwanyanje is the Kilifi County Woman Representative in the National Assembly of Kenya, serving in the 13th Parliament. She was elected on the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) ticket, having won the 2022 Kilifi Woman Representative election with 111,039 votes (39.33%).

creates.name: John Paul Mwirigi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: John Paul Mwirigi is the Member of Parliament for Igembe South Constituency, Meru County, in the Kenya National Assembly. He was elected in August 2017 at the age of 23 years, the youngest ever Kenyan member of parliament. He was re-elected on 9 August 2022 as Igembe South Constituency MP with a total of 34,561 votes. His closest opponent garnered 10,000 votes.

creates.name: Alice Wambui Ng'ang'a
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Alice Wambūi Ng'ang'a or Alice Wambūi is a Kenyan politician who was elected to be the Member of Parliament for the Thika Town Constituency in Kiambu County.

creates.name: Pamela Njoki Njeru
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Pamela Njoki Njeru is a Kenyan politician and member of Parliament through United Democratic Alliance (UDA) political party.

creates.name: Mary Wamaua Waithira Njoroge
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Mary Wamaua Waithìra Njoroge is a Kenyan politician. She is currently a Member of Parliament for Maragua Constituency in Murang’a County.

creates.name: Rachael Kaki Nyamai
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Rachael Kaki Nyamai is a Kenyan politician. She is a member of parliament for Kitui south constituency in Kitui County under Jubilee Party.

creates.name: Member of National Assembly Edith Nyenze
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Edith Vethi Nyenze is a Kamba Kenyan politician who is the incumbent Member of Parliament for Kitui West Constituency. She was elected to succeed her late husband Francis Nyenze as the 7th Member of Parliament for Kitui West Constituency. She belongs to the WDM.

creates.name: Hon Samson Ndindi Nyoro
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Ndindi Nyoro is a Kenyan politician currently serving as member of parliament (MP) for Kiharu Constituency in Murang'a County. He is also a businessman and entrepreneur. Nyoro belongs to United Democratic Alliance (UDA), a political party under the Kenya Kwanza alliance led by the president of Kenya, William Ruto. He is a graduate of Kenyatta University with a Bachelor of Arts (Economics) and was a student leader at the same university. Similarly, he holds two Master’s degrees; a Master of Arts in Economics, and a Master of Economics from the University of Nairobi and Kenyatta University respectively, which he pursued concurrently and successfully completed in 2025.

creates.name: Eve Akinyi Obara
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Eve Akinyi Obara is a Kenyan politician and the current Member of Parliament for Kabondo Kasipul Constituency in Homabay County. She has been a member of the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) since 2017.

creates.name: Innocent Obiri
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Innocent Momanyi Obiri is a Kenyan politician who is currently a member of the National Assembly for the Bobasi constituency, representing the Peoples Democratic Party.

creates.name: Ruweida Mohamed Obo
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Ruweida Mohamed Obo was born in 1978, in Pate Island, Lamu County. She is a Kenyan politician and the first woman elected as MP for Lamu East Constituency.

creates.name: David Ouma Ochieng'
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. David Ouma Ochieng' is the current Member of the National Assembly for Ugenya Constituency in Siaya County and the leader of the Movement for Democracy and Growth (MDG) party. He is a Kenyan politician serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022–2027).

creates.name: Millie Odhiambo
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Millie Grace Akoth Odhiambo Mabona is a Kenyan politician. She originally trained as a lawyer, and has been a member of parliament since 2008. She was first nominated and later elected as a Member of Suba North Constituency.

creates.name: Omanyo Catherine Nakhabi
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Catherine Nakhabi Omanyo is a Kenyan politician, education activist, and the county woman representative in National Assembly (Kenya) for Busia County. She is known for her human rights activism, especially her work advocating for the rights of women in Kenya and providing access to education for poor and orphaned children. She is also known as the founder of International School for Champions, a tuition-free school located in Busia County close to the border with Uganda.

creates.name: Christine Oduor Ombaka
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Christine Ombaka Oduor is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Joyce Osogo
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Joyce Atieno Osogo Bensuda is a Kenyan politician from the Orange Democratic Movement. She was elected to the National Assembly for Homa Bay Town in the 2022 general election.

creates.name: Mary Emaase Otuch
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Mary Emaase Otucho is a Kenyan accountant and politician. She was elected to the National Assembly in 2013 she was not re-elected in 2017. She was elected again to represent the Teso South constituency in Busia County in 2022.

creates.name: Wilberforce Oundo
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Wilberforce Ojiambo Oundo is a Kenyan politician. He is a member of the Orange Democratic Movement and has been member of the National Assembly since 2017.

creates.name: John Walter Owino
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. John Walter Owino is a Kenyan politician and member of the Felix Chimbly for Awendo Constituency. He is a member of the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Joshua Aduma Owuor
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Joshua Aduma Owuor is a Kenyan politician and lawyer. He is currently the Member of Parliament for Nyakach Constituency, serving since 2013 after being re-elected for another five-year term in the 2017 general elections.

creates.name: Joseph H Maero Oyula
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Joseph H Maero Oyula is the Member of the National Assembly for Butula Constituency in Busia County, representing the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). A sitting member of the 13th Parliament (2022-2027), he was first elected in 2017 and re-elected in the 2022 general election.

creates.name: Agnes Mantaine Pareyio
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Agnes Pareyio is a Maasai Kenyan women's rights activist, politician and founder and director of the Tasaru Ntomonok Rescue Center for Girls, an organization that campaigns against female genital cutting. In 2005 she was the UN Person of the Year and in 2022 she was elected as a member of parliament.

creates.name: Samuel Gonzi Rai
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Gonzi Samuel Rai is a Kenyan politician and a former member of Kenyan parliament from Kinango Constituency in Kwale County. He was first elected to the parliament in 1992 on the ticket of Kenya African National Union (KANU), and 2002 and 2007 on the ticket of Forum for the Restoration of Democracy–People (FORD-People) and won the election on the ticket of The National Alliance (TNA) in the 2013 parliamentary election. His legislative interest focuses on defence, security and public accounts.

creates.name: Dido Ali Raso
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Dido Ali is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. In the 2022 Kenyan general election, he was elected Member of Parliament for Saku.

creates.name: Reuben Kiborek
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Reuben Kiborek is the Member of Parliament for Mogotio Constituency, Baringo County, serving in the 13th Parliament (National Assembly) as a member of the United Democratic Alliance (UDA). He is serving his first term, having been elected in the 2022 Kenyan general election, in which he defeated Dr. Daniel Tuitoek and Professor Sambili with 17,364 votes.

creates.name: Peter Salasya Kalerwa
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Peter Kalerwa Salasya, also known as PK, is a Kenyan Politician and current member of parliament for Mumias East Constituency He was elected in the 2022 Kenyan general election on the Democratic Action Party–Kenya (DAP-K) ticket. Prior to entering politics, he worked in the banking sector and as a tutor. Salasya is known for his grassroots campaigns, his focus on reviving the Mumias Sugar Company, and for controversies related to assault and hate speech charges.

creates.name: Ibrahim Abdi Saney
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Ibrahim Abdi Saney is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Wajir North Constituency, Wajir County, elected on a UDA ticket in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027). His 2022 election was challenged by petition, but the petition was dismissed, upholding his win with 6,502 votes.

creates.name: Florence Sergon
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Flowrence Jematiah Sergon is a Kenyan politician who has been a member of the National Assembly since the August 2022. In 2017 she was elected a member of the East African Legislative Assembly (EALA).

creates.name: Omar Mwinyi Shimbwa
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Omar Mwinyi Shimbwa is a Kenyan politician and member of the Kenyan Parliament. He was elected as a member (MP) of the National Assembly of Kenya in 2013. He has been re-elected twice during the 2017 and 2022 Kenyan general election.

creates.name: Abdi Omar Shurie
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Abdi Omar Shurie is a Kenyan politician from the Jubilee Party. In the elections of 2017 and 2022, he was elected to the National Assembly in Balambala Constituency. The constituency is in Garissa County. In 2024 Hon Shurie was awarded 1st Class Honours Chief of the Order of the Burning spear, CBS by President William Ruto.

creates.name: Musa Sirma
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Musa Cherutich Sirma is a Kenyan politician. He is the former minister for East African and Regional Cooperation in Kenya and a former member of parliament for the Eldama Ravine Constituency.

creates.name: Hon Janet Jepkemboi Sitienei
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Janet Jepkemboi Sitienei is a Kenyan politician who was elected to the National Assembly in 2017 for the Jubilee Party and in 2022 for the United Democratic Alliance. In 2024 she became a Chief of the Order of the Burning Spear of Kenya in an award by President Ruto.

creates.name: Julius Sunkuli
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Julius Lekakeny Sunkuli is the Member of the National Assembly for Kilgoris Constituency in Narok County, elected on 8 August 2022 on a KANU ticket in the 13th Parliament. He previously served as a Cabinet minister.

creates.name: Rahab Mukami
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Rahab Mukami Wachira is a Kenyan politician who currently serves as the Woman Representative for Nyeri County in the National Assembly of Kenya. She sits in the Committee on Appointments, National Cohesion and Equal opportunity Committee and the Departmental Committee on Labour, in the 13th Parliament. She is a member of the Pan African Parliament. She was first elected to Parliament in 2017 and re-elected in 2022 on the ticket of the United Democratic Alliance (UDA), a party affiliated with the Kenya Kwanza coalition.

creates.name: Antony Njoroge Wainaina
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Anthony Njoroge Wainaina is the Member of the National Assembly for Kieni Constituency, Nyeri County. He was elected in 2022 on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket and is a sitting member of the 13th Parliament of Kenya.

creates.name: Catherine Wambilianga
creates.title: Woman Rep
creates.bio: Catherine Nanjala Wambilianga is a Kenyan politician. She is a member of the FORD–Kenya party.

creates.name: Gathoni Wamuchomba
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Peninnah Gathoni Mūchomba, also popularly known as Gathoni Wa Mūchomba, is a Kenyan journalist, entrepreneur and politician. She is the Member of Parliament for Githunguri Constituency in the bicameral Kenyan parliament since 2022 and a member of the ruling party, the UDA.

creates.name: Martha Wangari Wanjira
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Martha Wangarì Wanjìra is a Kenyan politician from the United Democratic Alliance. She represents the Gilgil Constituency in the National Assembly.

creates.name: John Kiarie Waweru
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: John Kìarie Wawerū, commonly known as KJ, is a Kenyan politician, comedian, media and communications professional, and educator. He has represented Dagoretti South Constituency in Nairobi County since 2017. Before entering politics, he was a co‑founder of the satirical comedy troupe Redykyulass and had a distinguished career across journalism, advertising, public campaigns, and board governance.

creates.name: Tim Wanyonyi
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Timothy Wanyonyi Wetangula is a Kenyan lawyer and politician serving as a member of parliament representing Westlands Constituency. He was first elected as a councillor for the defunct Nairobi City Council in 2007 election, before being elected Westlands MP during 2013 elections and defended his seat in the 2017 and 2022 general elections held on 8 August 2017 and 9 August 2022 respectively. He is a brother to Moses Wetangula, the Speaker of the National Assembly of Kenya and former senator for Bungoma County. He is a member of the Orange Democratic Movement.

creates.name: Japhet Miriti Kareke Mbiuki
creates.title: MP
creates.bio: Hon. Mbiuki Japhet Miriti Kareke is the Member of the National Assembly for Maara Constituency in Tharaka-Nithi County, elected on a UDA ticket in 2022 in his fourth term, and chairs the National Assembly Departmental Committee on Tourism and Wildlife. He previously represented the now-defunct Nithi Constituency from 2007 to 2013 before it was redrawn into Maara.

enriches.bio: Oburu Ng'ong'a Oginga is a Kenyan politician who is the current senator for Siay…

enriches.bio: Ibrahim Ali Roba, commonly known as Ali Roba is the first governor of Mandera Co…
